description: Curated public excerpts for NC FNS (SNAP) screening POC. Not an official DSS knowledge base.

sources.title: NC Food and Nutrition Services overview
sources.notes: Program overview and high-level eligibility factors.

sources.title: NC SNAP/FNS gross monthly income limits (FY 2026)
sources.publisher: More In My Basket (NC State / USDA-funded outreach)
sources.notes: Public screening table labeled Maximum Gross Monthly Income (200%). Some households may face a 130% test determined by DSS.

sources.title: General FNS requirements (residency, income, status)
sources.notes: Simplified general requirements for screening only.

sources.title: College student SNAP/FNS exemptions (summary)
sources.publisher: More In My Basket / USDA FNS
sources.notes: Student rules are complex; POC flags students and notes need for DSS review.

sources.title: How to apply for NC FNS (public pointers only)
sources.notes: Static application pointers. Agent never submits applications.
